title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Get up to GTA$1M and the Winter Highway Patrol Outfit with Twitch Drops
content:
Watch select streams during our Neighborhood Watch Event to earn up to GTA$1,000,000 and the Winter Highway Patrol Outfit.

Link your Twitch and Rockstar Games accounts and watch a participating Twitch channel in the Grand Theft Auto V category to claim:

- Watch 2 hours to claim GTA$250,000
- Watch 4 hours to claim GTA$250,000
- Watch 6 hours to claim GTA$500,000
- Watch 8 hours to claim the Winter Highway Patrol Outfit

Visit https://www.rockstargames.com/gta-online/twitch-drops to learn more.
